Curious to know how the “No-Sale” supplement sale can bring in free money even when they say NO to your
fitness package? Just because a potential member turns down your fitness package doesn’t mean they’ll turn
down supplements.
Here’s the scoop -- By offering them a training program for free that they can complete at home, you can still
offer them supplements at their nutrition orientation. It doesn’t matter how you got them in the door. They
came in the door wanting to make a change. With supplements, you can do this even if the sale for your training
is off the table.
In fact, by just adding in this one thing, it’ll take your close ratio from 50% to 70-80%. Not bad from a lost sale!
-NO- PAYS YOUR RENT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 16 --

Accountability is the most important part of the 42-day detox. Here is where you’ll build habits that will allow
you to achieve long-term success.
You’ll have one habit that you’ll start each week. Each will stack on the previous week’s and you’ll be a lean,
mean fat-burning machine at the end of it. The habits you’ll start are:
1. 	Weigh yourself daily
2. 	Weigh your food
3. 	Don’t snooze your alarm
4. 	Come in for a meeting
5. 	Drink water
6. 	Weigh out
Why just one habit a week? With most plans, you’ll try to do everything at once. That’s a recipe for failure. We
don’t wait you to fail. We want this to be the thing that finally helps you reach your goals. By breaking down
these easy-to-follow habits into weeks, it’ll help build long-term habits that will serve you a lifetime.
ACCOUNTABILITY OVERVIEW
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 16 --

Fitness is an important part but we wanted to keep it simple. You’ll only work out three times a week for
the duration of the challenge. By the time you’re finished, you’ll have completed nine bodyweight workouts
twice.
Why twice? Because we’ve built in progressions to the second half of the challenge so you can see your
improvement. So, week 4 you’ll do week 1 exercises again, week 5 you’ll do week 2, and so on. Simple enough,
right?
Could we bombard you with countless options to choose for workouts? Sure, but we wanted to make sure we
gave you the greatest chance to succeed. Do this in combination with the nutrition and accountability and
you WILL succeed.
FITNESS EXPLAINED
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 16 --

In order to maximize your results, you gotta move your body. We’ve designed these workouts so that
regardless of your fitness level, we’ve got you covered. It’s simple -- all you have to do is follow along. Under
each exercise, you’ll have a description telling you exactly what you need to do. Simply do the exercises on
the list and you’re done!
FITNESS SECTION OVERVIEW
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 16 --

Say goodbye to all the crazy food lists and complicated recipes. We made this stupid simple with just 6 meals
that are low FODMAP that will make you look good and feel good.
So here’s the thing -- you’ll have two options for each meal (breakfast, lunch, and dinner). Our assumption is that
you’ll have one option for half of the week and the other for the remainder. Since there are only 7 days of the
week, we made both of them for 4 days to make sure you have the food you need to succeed. Not crazy about
one of the options? Just double up on the other option and eat it all week.
We tried to use ingredients that most people not only liked, but had access to. A particular spice or vegetable
does no good if you don’t have access to it or have to shop at three different stores to find it. Simple, everyday
ingredients used to make delicious food.
For each meal, you’ll have two choices. To make sure you have enough for the week, we’ve included enough
ingredients so you can have both options 4 times.
Not crazy about one of the options? Just double up on the other option and eat it all week.
GROCERIES EXPLAINED
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 16 --

Who’s ready to get started?!
With any successful fitness transformation, there are three components: Fitness, Nutrition, and Accountability.
We’ve created individual portals for each to make it stupid simple so you can make the most out of this
challenge and finally see some results!
The fitness portion is made up of bodyweight exercises that you can do literally anywhere whether it be at home
or in a hotel room across the world. No additional equipment or memberships required.
The nutrition portion is made up of six recipes that are super simple to follow. You can choose between two
options each meal so you can eat more of the foods you enjoy. Make sure to watch the nutrition video where
we’ll cover this more in depth.
The accountability portion focuses on establishing just one new habit each week. These habits will build upon
each other to make sure you create positive, long-lasting habits that will help you not only reach your fitness
goals, but maintain it.
IP OVERVIEW
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 16 --

No complicated food lists. Just pick one of two options for each meal. Each recipe is low FODMAP which
means they are foods that are least likely to make you feel like garbage. When you feel like garbage, you won’t
push yourself in your workouts and won’t recover as quickly.
All you have to do is choose an option, go to the grocery store, and buy the ingredients you need. After that,
follow the recipe videos and you’re good to go.
We’ve provided two options for each meal (breakfast, lunch, and dinner). This gives you a nice variety of options
without overwhelming you. These meals are specifically designed to leave you looking and feeling your best.
NUTRITION - MEAL PLAN
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 16 --

This part is super simple, but not easy. Make sure you follow the videos on the meal plans closely. Also, make sure
you are taking your supplements. These will help you recover faster so that you can reach your goal faster. Even if
budget is an issue, taking the basic stack can do wonders.
Nutrition is arguably the most important aspect of this challenge. You can’t out-train a bad diet. This is a
culmination of our knowledge on what works best for most people. Look, fitness professionals don’t have some
superhuman dedication that allows us to eat healthy food all the time.
The truth? We’ve just found out how to make healthy foods taste better. We’ve done our best to share that
knowledge through our recipes. Sound good?
NUTRITION OVERVIEW
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 16 --

Dr. Kashey has specifically formulated these supplements to go hand-in-hand with the workouts and meal plans.
When they are taken together, that’s when we begin to see these crazy before-and-after photos.
Don’t get us wrong, when you eat from the meal plan and exercise consistently, you’ll see results. You’ll see good
results. But if you’re looking to make an amazing transformation, one where you have to buy all new clothes and
your friends don’t recognize you, you don’t want to skip the supplements.
They are formulated to maximize the effort you are putting in with the food and exercise to give you the mind-
blowing results you’ve been working for. We’ve seen people drop weight in this challenge that took them years to
put on just by incorporating these supplements into their plan. They’re that important.
SUPPLEMENTS

-- 9 of 16 --

• 	Create logins for your customers
• 	Personalize the funnel
• 	Where to put your videos and affiliate links
• 	And more
You’ll get guidance from our tech team and you’ll only have to do it once. So go get it done!
TECH OVERVIEW
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 16 --

For the first habit, you’ll simply be weighing yourself every day. First thing in the morning after you go to the
bathroom, hop on that bathroom scale buck naked. If your weight fluctuates daily, that’s ok! While weight loss
isn’t linear, fat loss is. We’ll still be able to see fat loss over a longer time period.
WEEK 1 - WEIGH IN
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 16 --

This week, all you’re going to do is weigh the food that you’re putting into your body. You’ll put your empty
plate on the scale, zero it out, then add your food. You are literally only adding one extra step. This makes it
super simple to follow and stick to. Once you control the food going into your body, you control your fat loss.
WEEK 2 - WEIGH YOUR FOOD
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 16 --

This week is super simple. Keep the promise to yourself and keep doing your workouts. A big part of that is not
to hit the snooze button. Even if you crawl out of bed for a half-assed workout, it still better than nothing and it
reinforces the promise to yourself.
WEEK 3 - WORK OUT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 16 --

What’s the number one thing that keeps most people from reaching their fitness goals? Plateaus. That’s why
coming into the gym and checking in is so important. We can get a progress report and make any changes
needed so that you keep getting results.
WEEK 4 - CHECK-IN
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 16 --

Water is super important. It keeps your body functioning as it should. It also helps fill up your stomach so you’re
not as hungry. This makes it easier to stick to your meal plans. If you’re a 200-pound person, shoot for a gallon
of water a day. If you’re a 100-pound woman, aim for half a gallon a day. To figure out your water intake, grab a
calculator if needed and starting drinking that water!
WEEK 5 - DRINK WATER
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 16 --

You’ve made it 95% further than everybody else. Congratulations! All you have to do now is to weigh out.
Click the link below to schedule your weigh out and post your before and after pictures!
WEEK 6 - WEIGH OUT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 16 --
